Name: Wireless Mouse
Description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with 2.4GHz connectivity and 1600 DPI precision.

Name: Mechanical Keyboard
Description: RGB backlit mechanical keyboard with blue switches and aluminum frame.

Name: 27-inch Monitor
Description: 4K UHD IPS display with 144Hz refresh rate and HDR support.

Name: USB-C Hub
Description: 7-in-1 USB-C hub with HDMI, USB 3.0, SD card reader, and 100W PD charging.

Name: Noise Cancelling Headphones
Description: Over-ear Bluetooth headphones with active noise cancellation and 30h battery life.

Name: Webcam 1080p
Description: Full HD webcam with auto-focus, dual microphones, and privacy shutter.

Name: Laptop Stand
Description: Adjustable aluminum laptop stand with ergonomic height and angle settings.

Name: External SSD 1TB
Description: Portable SSD with USB 3.2 Gen 2, read speeds up to 1050MB/s.
